title: isoetes coromandelina subsp. macrotuberculata
intro: Isoetes coromandelina subsp. macrotuberculata is a rare, submerged aquatic plant species found in India and Sri Lanka, belonging to the Isoetaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic medicine, and is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Isoetes coromandelina subsp. macrotuberculata include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and acting as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of extracts, decoctions, and powders, and are typically used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
